name: fetch-frequencies registry: an edit to the file is picked up on the next resolution without a restart
command: printf 'default: weekly\n' > ff.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetch-frequency-registry.sh" --source-id x --registry standards --file "$PWD/ff.yaml"; printf 'default: monthly\n' > ff.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetch-frequency-registry.sh" --source-id x --registry standards --file "$PWD/ff.yaml"
